notes: Path 1 of the publishable-artifact ROC plan. seed_long_paragraphs corpus (16 multi-fact paragraphs, 120 sieve-extracted source triples, 229-entity / 95-relation transductive vocabulary). KEY FINDING: v2.2 default lambda=0.05 was tuned on a 4-fact toy graph and is 38x too small for this corpus; auto-calibrated lambda = mean per-edge Laplacian = 1.92. The principled calibration scales with corpus.
